utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each item is fully specified: the property includes address, type, features, and price; financing includes package, interest rate, amortization period, down payment, monthly payment, closing cost, and notes; legal_services includes package, scope, cost, and timeline; moving_services includes package, coverage, cost, and timeline; setup_services includes utilities and estimated cost; total_budget includes all component costs and a total. All details are filled in as expected.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant chose a purchase property at 38 Sudbury St, Liberty Village, Toronto, ON — a 1–2 bedroom condo priced at CAD 485,000. This aligns most closely with the 'New Build' option in the ground truth since the price (CAD 480K vs. 485K) and eco-friendly, modern, 1–2 bedroom characteristics match Zara’s preferences. The financing package used was 'Luxury Villa Benchmark Mortgage (Fixed Traditional)', which corresponds to 'Traditional Mortgage' as the closest available match because the 'Luxury Villa' term appears in property names, not financing products. For legal services, the AI selected 'Premium Legal Package 38 Sudbury St', which corresponds to 'Premium Legal Package'. For moving services, it used 'Premium Moving 38 Sudbury St', which matches 'Premium Moving'. Finally, for setup services, it mentioned 'Eco-friendly, energy-efficient bundled hydro, heating, and internet setup', which corresponds to 'Premium Utilities' under utility setup because of the eco-friendly and energy-efficient description.
